description_long: This is a compact, single-family house with a light gray exterior and a gable roof, surrounded by a wooden fence. The property features a small front porch with steps leading up to the main entrance, flanked by a flower planter. Two cars are parked in the driveway, and the backyard includes a patio area with outdoor furniture and a large umbrella. Mature trees line the rear and side of the property, providing shade and privacy. Windows are symmetrically arranged on the front facade, and the house appears to have a modest, traditional architectural style.
description: A small, light gray house with a gable roof, front porch, driveway, and fenced yard with mature trees and patio furniture.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, porch, driveway with two cars, and the fenced yard with trees in the background.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the house's length, the backyard patio area with umbrella, and the dense row of trees along the fence.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by the tall trees, with the back of the house and part of the roof visible above the fence.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the patio area, side of the house, driveway, and the arrangement of trees along the fence.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a small porch, steps, and a single front door accented by a flower planter.
